posts.author: Aarti
posts.text: Filatex India is likely to make a loss in Q1 due to 75% capacity utilisation at breakeven EBIDTA (as per Q4 investor call). Even then the stock price is moving up due to long term prospects of company in recycling..

posts.author: aashu4uiit
posts.text: I found no evidence of a preferential issue to promoters at Filatex India Ltd (NSE: FILATEX) in the last 12–18 months, based on the data I can access.
